title: Spandam’s Frame-Up
description: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam, Kokoro. Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: This ship must have been really happy...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: The guy who talked to me...

summary: Spandam weaponizes Franky’s battle ships to frame Tom, turning Franky’s creations into the tool that destroys his family.
